english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا ذَا ٱلْمَنِّ وَٱلطَّوْلِ،يَا ذَا ٱلْجُودِ
english translation text: O Lord of favor and bounty!O Lord of magnanimity!
O He Who has chosen Muhammad and granted him victory!
Send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and forgive me all the sins that You have known
and they are written with you in a manifest record.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
